self_correction_logic: Q1. Wait, did I check if the sample consists of students? N/A, there is no sample. Q2. Wait, did I check the correlation matrix N to ensure it represents individuals, not teams or firms? N/A, there is no correlation matrix. Q3. Wait, is the boundary spanning being performed by the focal respondent, or are they rating their manager? N/A. Q4. Wait, did they measure mere communication frequency or adaptive selling instead of purposive boundary spanning? N/A. Q5. Wait, is the BSB variable just a moderator or correlated with regression residuals? N/A. Q6. Wait, is this Leader BSB? N/A. Q7. Wait, is this Intra-Organizational BSB? N/A. Q8. Wait, before I apply Code 1, is the construct actually BSB? N/A, this is an editorial for a special issue, not an empirical study. As it provides no empirical data and is not a primary study, it falls under multiple exclusion criteria: no effect size of interest (Code 1) and non-primary study (Code 4).
reason_summary: [Code 1 & Code 4] Non-primary study (editorial) lacking empirical data and effect sizes.
verbatim: [Introduction] "In this editorial for our special issue on interorganizational collaboration (IOC), we position collaborative action in the context of the concurrent global crises that necessitate the bridging of interests, positions, competencies, and resources." [Introduction] "To place the papers included in this special issue in context, we ﬁrst describe the basic concepts and approaches that constitute IOC as a ﬁeld of study."
